notes: TASK COMPLETED. All implementation work finished with full TDD. Final validation: 857 tests passing across 34 test files. Implemented: (1) P1 Security Fix - tenant isolation enforced in prediction.job.ts (removed random UUID fallback, 6 new tests), (2) P2 Input Sanitizer - Zod-based validation with UUID, string sanitization, tenant context validation (30 tests), (3) P2 Job Idempotency - TTL-based idempotency handler with SHA256 key generation (21 tests). All MATOP gates passed: TypeCheck, Lint (0 errors, 10 warnings), Build, Tests. Attestation created at sprint-8/IFC-095-attestation.json. P3 frontend hook deferred as optional enhancement per plan.
